news.headline: Marine Le Pen: Narrowing deficit to 3% by 2029 isn't credible.
Xai Foundation partners with Xtermination for armored warfare game on Xai Games, leveraging Web3 technology.
news.summary: In George Town, Cayman Islands, on December 5, 2024, the Xai Foundation, a major supporter of the gaming-focused blockchain platform Xai, revealed a significant collaboration with Xtermination. Xtermination is a free-to-play multiplayer game centered on armored warfare with advanced Web3 integration. This partnership aims to enhance player experience and expand the capabilities of the gaming network. Stay tuned for exciting developments in this sector.

news.headline: Standard Motor Products, Inc. (NYSE: SMP) named one of America's Most Responsible Companies for 2nd year by Newsweek and Statista. 21 companies in automotive sector.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Standard Motor Products, Inc. (NYSE: SMP) announced its inclusion in the prestigious list of America's Most Responsible Companies 2025 by Newsweek and Statista. SMP is among the exclusive group of 21 companies in the automotive and components sector to receive this recognition.

news.headline: castLabs' DRMtoday chosen by Titan OS for cloud DRM solution in Barcelona, Dec. 5, 2024. Global pioneer in video technology.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, castLabs, a leading global provider of premium digital video technology, revealed a partnership with Titan OS S.L. (Titan OS), an innovative technology, entertainment, and advertising firm based in Barcelona, Spain. Titan OS selected castLabs' cloud-based digital rights management (DRM) solution for their services.

news.headline: BYU QB Jake Retzlaff partners with Manischewitz in historic NIL deal for Chanukah.
news.summary: In Bayonne, New Jersey, on December 5, 2024, Manischewitz® revealed a significant NIL (Name, Image, Likeness) partnership with Jake Retzlaff. Retzlaff, the renowned quarterback for the BYU Cougars, has made history as the first Jewish quarterback for Brigham Young University. This pioneering sponsorship marks a milestone in both Manischewitz®'s marketing endeavors and the representation of diverse athletes in collegiate football.

news.headline: EU defence chief floats joint debt funding based on NATO target.
Kenon Holdings reports Q3 2024 results, repurchases 348,000 shares for $10 million.
news.summary: Singapore, December 5, 2024 - Kenon Holdings Ltd. released its Q3 2024 results and provided other relevant updates. In the mentioned quarter, Kenon repurchased around 348,000 shares for about $10 million as part of its share buyback program.

news.headline: Former prosecutor Tara Lenich launches Liberty Advisors to support federal defendants, offering guidance from indictment to incarceration.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 5, 2024, it was revealed that former Assistant District Attorney Tara Lenich has established Liberty Advisors to provide crucial guidance to individuals facing federal charges right from the beginning of their legal process. Lenich's initiative aims to assist people at the initial stages of their legal battles.

news.headline: ACR Poker launches iOS app, offers exclusive Mobile-Only MTTs from Dec. 8-22. Join now for a chance to win big!
news.summary: In Costa Rica, on December 5, 2024, ACR Poker introduced its iOS mobile app, offering players a chance to experience its mobile platform through special Mobile-Only Multi-Table Tournaments (MTTs). From December 8 to 22, poker enthusiasts can join in for a limited time.

news.headline: meQuilibrium's study highlights key obstacles to workforce change readiness, emphasizes toll of poorly managed psychosocial risk. Gen Z struggles with change. #workforcechange #meQuilibrium #genZ
news.summary: A recent study has shown that remote work no longer offers significant well-being benefits. Younger Generation Z employees view the shift as routine, but struggle to effectively manage it. The findings come from meQuilibrium's State of the Workforce Report, unveiled in Boston on December 5, 2024. This report is unique for providing insight into the changing landscape of work and highlights a shift in attitudes towards remote work among employees.

news.headline: AITX aims to triple ARR run rate to $10 million this fiscal year with strong Q3 growth, supported by expanding RMR and robust sales funnel.
news.summary: The third quarter saw significant growth in revenue, setting the company on track to reach $10 million in annual recurring revenue (ARR). This growth was driven by an increase in recurring monthly revenue (RMR), successful product launches, and a strong sales pipeline.

news.headline: Blue Vista and Clarion buy 2,787-bed student housing portfolio with 855 units at 4 locations serving 3 universities.
news.summary: In Chicago, Blue Vista Capital Management, LLC ("Blue Vista"), a real estate investment management firm, partnered with Clarion Partners, LLC ("Clarion") to acquire a four-property student housing portfolio from Columbus Pacific Group. The purchased portfolio encompasses four high-quality, Class-A student housing complexes with a total of 855 units. These properties cater to students attending Pennsylvania State University, College of Charleston, and Texas A&M University.

news.headline: Minimal jobless claims indicate stability for the U.S. economy, with few layoffs reported.
Morphy's in Vegas hosting auction of coin-ops and antique advertising on Dec 5-7, featuring items like 1905 arcade rifle game ($100K-$200K) and John Deere Plows sign ($40K-$70K).
news.summary: This holiday season in Las Vegas, a 1905 Ray-O-Lite arcade rifle game is expected to fetch between $100,000 and $200,000 at auction. Additionally, a naive circa-1910s John Deere Plows sign is estimated to sell for $40,000 to $70,000. At the same auction, an Anheuser-Busch 1930 Cadillac 'Bevo Boat' and a circa-1927 Ahrens-Fox fire engine are both priced between $50,000 and $150,000. This event is sure to attract collectors and enthusiasts looking to add these unique and valuable pieces to their collections.

news.headline: California had 12,835 overdose deaths in one year, leading the nation. Report by HHR discusses fentanyl crisis impact.
news.summary: California, the state most significantly affected, reported the highest number of overdose deaths in the country with 12,835 fatalities in a single year. On December 5, 2024, in Los Angeles, Hollywood Hills Recovery (HHR) published a detailed analysis on the severe consequences of the fentanyl epidemic in California. The report, titled...

news.headline: Study shows non-invasive brain surgery for severe OCD gives lasting relief. Bilateral capsulotomy offers positive long-term outcomes for patients.
news.summary: A recent study revealed encouraging outcomes of bilateral capsulotomy as a treatment for severe obsessive-compulsive disorder, which tends to be resistant to traditional therapies and significantly affects patients' quality of life. The research, conducted in Seoul, discovered that this approach yielded positive long-term results for individuals struggling with OCD. The study's findings, published on December 5, 2024, highlighted the potential effectiveness of bilateral capsulotomy in managing this challenging psychological condition.

news.headline: MaxLinear unveils quad RS-485 receivers for robust system design in industrial settings with enhanced protection.
news.summary: A new product launch in Carlsbad, California introduces MaxLinear's quad RS-485 serial receivers, tailored for robust communication in harsh industrial settings. The receivers are purpose-built to guarantee dependable operation, serving the needs of industries requiring reliability in their communication systems.

news.headline: Chartis Research names SAS as leader in asset liability management for 2nd year, top in all six quadrants. 25 asset and liability firms evaluated.
news.summary: SAS has once again been recognized as a leader in the Chartis ALM Solutions, 2024 report, receiving the top designation in all six quadrants. The report, released on December 5, 2024, by Chartis Research, highlights SAS as a category leader for the second year in a row. Competing against 25 asset and liability management providers, SAS secured the top spot across all categories, showcasing its dominance in the industry. This achievement underscores SAS's continued excellence and innovation in the evolving landscape of ALM solutions.

news.headline: National Partners partners with Input 1 to streamline operations for insurance industry. Collaboration to boost efficiency and innovation.
news.summary: A premium finance company called National Partners based in Denver revealed a new strategic partnership with Input 1 on December 5, 2024. This national alliance aims to boost the growth of National Partners, which has been expanding rapidly. National Partners was specifically looking for a partnership to enhance its billing system and other operational aspects.

news.headline: NextGen Healthcare selected by Fairfax-Falls Church CSB to expand Behavioral Health and Disability Services in Fairfax, VA.
news.summary: A company based in Fairfax, Virginia, has been selected by the Fairfax-Falls Church Community Services Board (CSB) to assist in delivering critical services to Fairfax County, Virginia, as well as the cities of Fairfax and Falls Church. NextGen Healthcare, a prominent healthcare technology provider, will provide support through their NextGen® Enterprise EHR (electronic health record) and NextGen® Enterprise PM (practice management) systems. The aim is to enhance interoperability and aid in the provision of life-saving services.

news.headline: Bitcoin predicted to become 'premier store of value,' reaching $1 million by 2033 according to Bernstein Research.
news.summary: Bernstein Research predicts that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) will become the leading "store of value" asset, potentially surpassing gold within the next ten years. The analysis highlights Bitcoin's increasing significance in institutional investment portfolios and corporate treasury functions, indicating its growing prominence within the global financial landscape. According to analysts at Bernstein, Bitcoin is expected to establish itself as the modern prime 'store of value' asset, with its inclusion in multi-asset portfolios demonstrating a more mature outlook among investors worldwide. The report also envisions Bitcoin as a standard choice for corporate investment strategies. Find the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Eaton to build renewable energy microgrid for Wisconsin school, saving $190,000/year. Largest in state. Net zero by 2025.
news.summary: Eaton, an intelligent power management company, is set to install a renewable energy microgrid at Maplewood Intermediate/Middle School in Menasha, Wisconsin. This initiative aims to offer affordable, resilient, and sustainable power solutions. Expected to be the largest of its kind in Wisconsin, the system is projected to save the Menasha Joint School District around $190,000 annually in energy expenses. Completion of the project is scheduled for 2025. The goal is to reach net zero energy status and cater to approximately xxx students.

news.headline: BridgePort launches middleware for institutional crypto off-exchange settlement in New York on Dec. 5, 2024, improving efficiency and connectivity for trading firms, exchanges, and custodians.
news.summary: Launching in New York on December 5, 2024, BridgePort introduces a cutting-edge middleware platform aiming to improve institutional crypto trading. This revolutionary platform aims to boost market efficiency, connectivity, and true interoperability among trading firms, exchanges, and custodians. With a focus on empowering the industry, BridgePort's platform is set to transform the landscape with its innovative capabilities.

news.headline: Bob Woodruff Foundation and Navy Federal Credit Union donate $500K for emergency aid to service members and families.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 5, 2024, in New York, the Bob Woodruff Foundation (BWF) and the Navy Federal Credit Union (NFCU) revealed a significant $500,000 donation. This funding will be allocated to four relief organizations to offer financial support to service members and their families.

news.headline: SimX gets $1.25M grant from AFWERX for VR training to aid medical support.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, on December 5, 2024, SimX has disclosed that it was chosen by AFWERX for a Phase II STTR funding of $1,250,000. This funding is intended for the development of modifications to SimX's Virtual Reality Medical Simulation System (VRMSS) to enhance perioperative expeditionary medical support.

news.headline: New study by Parks Associates: Apartment residents consume more digital content than condo or single-family home residents.
news.summary: New research on consumer preferences for managed Wi-Fi in multi-dwelling units (MDUs) and sessions on Smart Spaces indicates a growing demand for advanced access control. The study conducted in Dallas on December 5, 2024, discovered that apartment residents have a greater consumption rate of digital content compared to other demographic groups. The study, titled "Managed Wi-Fi: MDU Resident Demand & Preferences," revealed that a significant percentage of MDU residents prefer advanced access control features.

news.headline: CEO Joe Cecala of Dream Exchange appeared on Scripps News with Bryant and Nguyen, discussing visionary goals. Aired on Nov 8, 2024.
news.summary: Dream Exchange is excited to share that its Founder and CEO, Joe Cecala, appeared on Scripps News The National Report alongside Christian Bryant and Chris Nguyen. The interview, which aired on November 8, 2024, highlighted the company's visionary goals and initiatives.

news.headline: MeetRecord introduces Revenue Intelligence 2.0 for companies, analyzing 13M sales calls to improve team performance.
news.summary: A revenue intelligence solution called MeetRecord, based in San Francisco, has utilized AI-powered capabilities to examine more than 13 million sales calls. This analysis has helped uncover key deal risks and obstacles encountered by sales teams. The aim is to enhance team performance and speed up the sales cycle. The data from the analysis provides valuable insights that can assist in addressing these challenges.

news.headline: OneUnited Bank, largest Black-owned bank, named to Inc. Magazine's 2024 Best in Business List in Financial Services.
news.summary: In Boston on December 5, 2024, OneUnited Bank, the largest Black-owned bank in the United States, was selected for Inc.'s prestigious 2024 Best in Business list in Financial Services. This accolade acknowledges companies that excel in their respective industries.

news.headline: COSI, McGill, and U.S. State Department celebrate 70 years of Bellairs Research Institute in Barbados. 400 Learning Lunchboxes given to local students in support of science education.
news.summary: Today in Columbus, Ohio, a special event took place to distribute 400 Learning Lunchboxes to local students, emphasizing the significance of promoting science education in Barbados and beyond. This initiative showcases a shared commitment to advancing learning opportunities.

news.headline: Alpine Intel acquires The Robison Group, expands fraud investigation services. Deal announced in Charlotte, NC on Dec. 5, 2024.
news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina - On December 5, 2024, Alpine Intel, a prominent insurance solutions provider, revealed its acquisition of The Robison Group to enhance its fraud investigation services. This move is in alignment with Alpine Intel's strategic growth plan. The Robison Group is known for its investigative solutions, particularly in the realm of fraud detection. This acquisition aims to bolster Alpine Intel's capabilities in this area, further solidifying its position in the market.

news.headline: Global frozen foods market valued at USD 284.2 billion in 2023, expected to reach USD 363.7 billion by 2028, growing at CAGR of 5.1%. E-commerce driving growth, offering convenience and sustainability. Packaged foods industry spurring demand. Online distribution channel set to grow at highest CAGR.
news.summary: The global frozen foods market, valued at USD 284.2 billion in 2023, is projected to reach USD 363.7 billion by 2028, with a CAGR of 5.1%. The extended shelf life of frozen foods reduces food waste, a growing global concern. E-commerce has significantly boosted market growth, offering convenience for consumers to buy frozen foods online. The market benefits from the rise in the packaged food industry, meeting consumer demands for convenience and portability. Online distribution channels are expected to have the highest CAGR, with the COVID-19 pandemic accelerating the trend. Globalization has also expanded frozen food options, providing consumers with a wide range of international cuisines.

news.headline: Calabrio partners with industry leaders to launch CareAI for healthcare, improving patient care with AI tech.
news.summary: In Minneapolis, Calabrio, a workforce performance company, has partnered with industry leaders and DIGITAL, Canada’s Global Innovation Cluster for digital technologies. The partnership aims to revolutionize healthcare contact centers with a project called CareAI. This initiative focuses on patient-centered care by leveraging innovative technologies and enhancing operational efficiency. In collaboration with ORX and Queen, the project will bring significant advancements to the healthcare industry.

news.headline: Brown Forman Inc Class B Common Stock (NYSE:BF) outperformed estimated earnings in Q2, released on Dec 5, 2024, at 08:00 AM.
news.summary: Brown Forman Inc Class B Common Stock (NYSE:BF) released its second-quarter earnings report on Thursday, December 5, 2024, at 08:00 AM. The company exceeded the projected earnings, showcasing a strong financial performance. For more details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Brown-Forman Class B stock (NYSE: BF) beat earnings estimates in Q2; full details on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: On Thursday, December 5, 2024, Brown Forman Inc Class B Common Stock (NYSE: BF) reported their Q2 earnings at 08:00 AM. The company exceeded projected earnings. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Businessolver® enhances MyChoice Find a Provider tool, powered by Amino Health, for seamless access to healthcare providers and prescription savings.
news.summary: In Denver, Businessolver® has announced significant improvements to its MyChoice Find a Provider tool, which is crucial for Benefits Administration. The update, in partnership with Amino Health, includes an enhanced interface with additional features. This aims to offer HR professionals and benefits administrators easy access to healthcare providers and substantial discounts on medications. The improved tool is designed to streamline the process and provide cost-effective solutions for users.

news.headline: Brown-Forman Inc. (NYSE: BF) beats estimated earnings in Q2 report released on Dec 5, 2024 at 08:00 AM. Details on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Brown-Forman Inc Class B Common Stock (NYSE: BF) reported its second-quarter earnings on Thursday, December 5, 2024, at 08:00 AM. The company exceeded earnings expectations, showcasing strong performance during the period. For more detailed information on this report, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Moveworks AI collaborates with Box, making information instantly accessible for employees. Integration transforms how employees interact with Box content.
news.summary: Moveworks, the AI-powered Copilot based in Mountain View, California, has revealed its new partnership with Box, a popular Intelligent Content Management (ICM) platform. Through the use of Moveworks' Agentic Reasoning Engine, this integration aims to revolutionize how employees engage with data on Box, allowing them to swiftly retrieve pertinent information and extract key insights in a matter of seconds. This advancement brings a new level of efficiency and convenience to users by streamlining access to important data stored within Box, all through the familiar interface of their existing collaboration tools.

news.headline: Brown Forman Inc Class B Common Stock (NYSE: BF) beat Q2 earnings estimates, released on Dec 5, 2024, at 08:00 AM. Read more on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: On Thursday, December 5, 2024 at 08:00 AM, Brown Forman Inc Class B Common Stock (NYSE:BF) released its Q2 earnings report, exceeding expected earnings. For further details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: MarketAxess launches AI-powered pricing engine CP+ for municipal bonds; Expands coverage beyond credit and rates markets. $MKTX
news.summary: MarketAxess Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: MKTX) based in New York, has introduced its CP+ AI-powered algorithmic pricing engine to include municipal bonds. This electronic trading platform specializes in fixed-income securities trading. With access to exclusive data from the MarketAxess trading platform, TraX® market data, and external sources like TRACE, CP+ offers pricing insights beyond standard fixed-income pricing sources, covering global credit and rates markets. This enhancement diversifies the offering of CP+ by including municipal bonds in its coverage.

news.headline: Crédit Agricole CIB finalizes $300MM loan with LATAM Airlines Group S.A. featuring sustainability-linked criteria.
news.summary: In New York, Crédit Agricole Corporate and Investment Bank has finalized a $300 million engine financing deal with LATAM Airlines Group S.A., integrating a sustainability aspect. This arrangement is a continuation of several spare engine financings LATAM has engaged in with Crédit Agricole CIB in recent years. The facility is backed by spare engines for LATAM's main narrowbody and widebody aircraft fleet. Alongside acting as Co-Lead Arranger, Crédit Agricole CIB has been a prominent figure in LATAM's aircraft financing endeavors for the past decade.

news.headline: Intel adds Eric Meurice and Steve Sanghi as independent directors to its board, expanding to 12 members.
news.summary: Intel Corporation, based in Santa Clara, California, has recently disclosed the appointment of Eric Meurice and Steve Sanghi to its board of directors. These individuals will be assuming roles as independent directors within the company.

news.headline: Fiserv CEO Frank Bisignano nominated as Social Security Administration Commissioner by President-elect Trump. Confirmation pending.
news.summary: Fiserv, Inc., a prominent provider of payments and financial services technology solutions, shared that Frank Bisignano, its Chairman, President, and CEO, was chosen by President-elect Donald J. Trump to be the Commissioner of the Social Security Administration. This nomination is pending confirmation by the U.S. Senate. While awaiting confirmation, Mr. Bisignano will maintain his roles at Fiserv. The company, listed under the ticker FI on the NYSE, stands as a leading entity in the industry.

news.headline: Fidelity Q3 2024 Retirement Analysis: Strong growth for retirement savers with highest 401(k) and 403(b) balances on record. Gen X shows positive strides in IRA savings.
news.summary: In the most recent Q3 2024 retirement analysis by Fidelity Investments®, it was revealed that retirement savers saw growth in their savings due to high contribution levels and favorable market conditions. The average balances in 401(k) and 403(b) accounts reached record highs during this period. Furthermore, Gen X-ers showed progress in their retirement savings, with rises in both IRA contributions and the count of IRA accounts receiving contributions.

news.headline: GeneDx partnering with Biogen, Praxis Precision Medicines, and Stoke Therapeutics to expand access to exome testing for pediatric epilepsy patients.
news.summary: GeneDx, based in Stamford, Connecticut, revealed today that Biogen, Praxis Precision Medicines, and Stoke Therapeutics have joined as the inaugural partners in its Patient Access Program for epilepsy.

news.headline: Medifast survey finds most US adults aiming to lose weight agree lifestyle changes are key, alongside weight loss meds.
news.summary: In Baltimore, Medifast, a renowned health and wellness company listed on NYSE as MED, released insights from an independent survey. In collaboration with Talker Research, a third-party market research firm, Medifast sought to delve into American attitudes towards weight loss medications and their impact on health journeys. The survey aimed to highlight areas requiring additional support. The findings shed light on crucial aspects within the weight loss realm.

news.headline: ClearanceJobs acknowledged by White House for advancing skills-based hiring practices in cybersecurity. #DHX
news.summary: In Centennial, Colorado, DHI Group, Inc. revealed that ClearanceJobs, the leading online platform for cleared cyber professionals, was commended by the White House as a vital private-sector ally in enhancing the national cybersecurity workforce. This recognition was made public by National Cyber Director Harry Coker, emphasizing ClearanceJobs' dedication to promoting skills-focused recruitment procedures for cleared technical positions. This recognition underscores the significance of private entities collaborating with the government to address critical cybersecurity needs.

news.headline: Trust Stamp priced a $3.0 million offering, selling 5,555,548 common stock shares at an effective price of $0.54 per share.
news.summary: Atlanta, Georgia, December 5, 2024 - Global AI technology provider Trust Stamp (Nasdaq: IDAI) has disclosed entering a securities purchase agreement with a single institutional investor. The agreement entails the acquisition of 5,555,548 shares of common stock or pre-funded warrants. Additionally, in a simultaneous private placement, the company has committed to selling unregistered Series A Warrants for purchasing up to 5,555,548 shares and unregistered Series B Warrants for obtaining up to 4,166,661 shares of common stock. The pricing for each share of common stock or pre-funded warrant, along with the related Series A and Series B Warrants, is set at $0.54. The private placement warrants will be executable upon shareholder approval, holding a five-year validity from the initial exercise date with an exercise price of $0.54 per share.

news.headline: J-Long Group Limited to undergo 1-for-10 stock split to meet NASDAQ bid price requirement; trading to adjust December 10.
news.summary: Hong Kong, December 5, 2024 - J-Long Group Limited (Nasdaq: JL), a distributor in Hong Kong specializing in reflective and non-reflective garment trims like heat transfers, fabrics, labels, tapes, sewing badges, and more, has announced a share consolidation ("Reverse Stock Split") of its Ordinary Shares at a ratio of 1-for-10. This move, effective from 11:59 pm on December 9, 2024, aims to meet Nasdaq's minimum $1.00 bid price per share requirement under Marketplace Rules 5550(a)(2) and Rule 5450(a)(1). Trading of the company's Ordinary Shares post consolidation will begin on December 10, 2024, on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol "JL."

news.headline: Branded Legacy is strengthening leadership in biotech with focus on expanding Sycamore BioPharma and rebranding to Royal Enterprises.
news.summary: A corporation is shifting its focus towards Sycamore BioPharma, overcoming obstacles, and getting ready for a rebranding to Royal Enterprises, Inc. It is anticipated that this strategic move will result in significant growth and prosperity for the company.
